vm_notes.sourceTitle: Inside vLLM: Anatomy of a High-Throughput LLM Inference System | vLLM Blog

disallowing.definition:
verb
  1. To refuse to allow
  2. To reject as invalid, untrue, or improper
  e.g. The prisoners were disallowed to contact with a lawyer.

definitions.example: The prisoners were disallowed to contact with a lawyer.
meanings: To reject as invalid, untrue, or improper

disallowing.sentence: Chunked prefill is a technique for handling long prompts by splitting their prefill step into smaller chunks. Without it, we could end up with a single very long request monopolizing one engine step disallowing other prefill requests to run. That would postpone all other requests and increase their latency.
disallowing.sourceTitle: Inside vLLM: Anatomy of a High-Throughput LLM Inference System | vLLM Blog

meanings: To delay or put off an event, appointment etc.

postpone.sentence: Chunked prefill is a technique for handling long prompts by splitting their prefill step into smaller chunks. Without it, we could end up with a single very long request monopolizing one engine step disallowing other prefill requests to run. That would postpone all other requests and increase their latency.
postpone.sourceTitle: Inside vLLM: Anatomy of a High-Throughput LLM Inference System | vLLM Blog
